steps.title: Focus on the tested hypothesis
steps.content: The researchers' hypothesis says that leaders who reflect on lessons learned from mistakes should show more humility than leaders who do not. Supporting data must show the learning-from-mistake group with the highest humility score.

steps.title: Use the group comparisons
steps.content: A only states a score ceiling and does not compare the groups. B misreads the control group because it is not lower than both experimental groups. D mentions expectations that the graph does not provide. The graph supports the claim that the learning-from-mistake group showed more humility than the other two groups. The answer is C.
